input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.5.6.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.5.6.5
            TITLE: any catch can on the cooling system must vent through a hose with a minimum internal

            CONTENT:
            rule T.5.6.5: Any catch can on the cooling system must vent through a hose with a minimum internal
T.5.6.5 Any catch can on the cooling system must vent through a hose with a minimum internal 
diameter of 3 mm down to the bottom levels of the Chassis.

final_answer: Any catch can on the cooling system must vent through a hose with a minimum internal diameter of 3 mm down to the bottom levels of the Chassis.
